scripts.test: node tests/config.test.js && node tests/video-source.test.js && node tests/article-source.test.js && node tests/server.test.js && node tests/integration.test.js
scripts.postinstall: cd web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.release:local: npm pack && npm install -g scholia-$(node -p "require('./package.json').version").tgz && rm scholia-*.tgz
